prerequisites: A running Weaviate instance, either self-hosted or on Weaviate Cloud (the Airbyte destination requires Weaviate version 1.21.2 or later).
The Weaviate cluster URL (REST endpoint), supplied as the host in the indexing config. Airbyte Cloud requires the endpoint to use TLS.
Credentials for the cluster if it is not running in anonymous mode: a Weaviate API key or OIDC bearer token (indexing.auth.token), or a username and password (indexing.auth.password).

If embeddings are computed by the connector, an API key for the chosen embedding service: OpenAI (embedding.openai_key), Cohere (embedding.cohere_key), or a generic provider key (embedding.api_key). No key is needed when using pre-calculated embeddings from a field or no embedding.
Decisions for the processing config (chunk size and the text fields to embed) and the embedding config, both of which are required.

authMethods.name: API token or API key (indexing.auth.token)
authMethods.summary: Authenticate to the Weaviate cluster with an API key or OIDC bearer token. On Weaviate Cloud, create the key from the cluster's API Keys section under Cluster details, then click New key; the key is shown only once, so copy it immediately. Provide it as indexing.auth.token.

authMethods.name: Username and password (indexing.auth.password)
authMethods.summary: Authenticate with username and password credentials, supplying the password as the secret field indexing.auth.password. Use this when the Weaviate instance is configured to accept username and password credentials rather than an API key.

authMethods.name: Embedding-service API keys (embedding.openai_key, embedding.cohere_key, embedding.api_key)
authMethods.summary: Not used to log in to Weaviate, but required when the connector generates embeddings. Supply embedding.openai_key for OpenAI, embedding.cohere_key for Cohere, or embedding.api_key for the generic provider. Omit these when using pre-calculated embeddings or no embedding.

setupSteps.title: Provision a Weaviate cluster and obtain its URL
setupSteps.body: Stand up a Weaviate instance (self-hosted or on Weaviate Cloud) at version 1.21.2 or later. Note the cluster URL / REST endpoint to use as the host in the indexing config. On Airbyte Cloud the endpoint must use TLS.

setupSteps.title: Create credentials for the cluster
setupSteps.body: If the cluster is not in anonymous mode, create an authentication credential. On Weaviate Cloud, open the console, select the cluster, go to API Keys under Cluster details, click New key, provide a descriptive name and choose a role, and create the key; copy the key immediately because it is shown only once. Provide this as the token (indexing.auth.token), or supply a username and password (indexing.auth.password) if the instance uses that scheme.

setupSteps.title: Configure the embedding method
setupSteps.body: Set the required embedding config. Choose OpenAI (text-embedding-ada-002, 1536 dims) with embedding.openai_key, Cohere (embed-english-light-v2.0, 1024 dims) with embedding.cohere_key, a generic provider with embedding.api_key, pre-calculated embeddings from a field, or no embedding. Provide the matching secret key only for services that require one.

setupSteps.title: Configure indexing and processing
setupSteps.body: In the indexing config set the host (cluster URL) and the chosen auth, and optionally set tenant_id for multi-tenancy (indexing.tenant_id) and any custom HTTP headers (indexing.additional_headers, with secret values). In the required processing config set the chunk size in tokens (up to 8191 for OpenAI text-embedding-ada-002) and the text fields to embed. Optionally enable omit_raw_text to avoid storing the raw source text.
